CustomField.formula: IF ( AND(ISNULL(CW_MaterialDailySalesCalculation__c) ,ISNULL(CS_sittyuubi__c),ISNULL(CS_jyuttyubi__c)), null ,IF ( NOT( ISNULL(CW_MaterialDailySalesCalculation__c) ) ,CW_MaterialDailySalesCalculation__c , IF ( NOT( ISNULL(CS_sittyuubi__c) ) ,CS_sittyuubi__c ,IF ( NOT( ISNULL(CS_jyuttyubi__c) ) ,CS_jyuttyubi__c ,null ))))
CustomField.label: フォロー日
